General.Name: Zensun Enterprises Ltd
General.Description: Zensun Enterprises Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, property investment, project management and sales services, hotel operations, and securities trading and investment businesses. The company also offers loan financing services. It operates in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Singapore, and Hong Kong. The company was formerly known as ZH International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Zensun Enterprises Limited in July 2019. Zensun Enterprises Limited was incorporated in 1965 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. The company is a subsidiary of Joy Town Inc.
